svg.title: Bedroom one memory fragment (apartment two)
svg.desc: Cropped vignette: a transitional bedroom mid-unpack. Edge of bed at left, window upper-center showing a slowly-changing outside, small dresser at right with a framed photo (sometimes empty, sometimes gone) and a lamp casting warm light. Half-unpacked boxes on the floor, folded clothes, tangled cords, faded rectangles on the wall where pictures used to hang.
